title: A constant-velocity joint assembly and a power tool comprising the same
abstract: A constant-velocity joint assembly (1) comprising: an output shaft (7), and a coupling structure (5) configured to drive the output shaft (7), wherein the output shaft (7) and the coupling structure (5) form a first joint configured to enable angling of the output shaft (7) relative to the coupling structure (5) at constant rotational speed, wherein the coupling structure (5) is provided with a torque transducer (5f) configured to detect a torque acting on the coupling structure (5) provided by the output shaft (7).
claims:
Claims i6 CLAIMS 1. A constant-velocity joint assembly (1) comprising: an output shaft (7), and a coupling structure (5) configured to drive the output shaft (7), wherein the output shaft (7) and the coupling structure (5) form a first joint configured to enable angling of the output shaft (7) relative to the coupling structure (5) at constant rotational speed, wherein the coupling structure (5) is provided with a torque transducer (5f) configured to detect a torque acting on the coupling structure (5) provided by the output shaft (7) . 2. The constant-velocity joint assembly (1) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the torque transducer (5f) comprises strain gauge elements. 3. The constant-velocity joint assembly (1) as claimed in claim 1 or 2, wherein the torque transducer (5f) is provided on an external peripheral surface of the coupling structure (5) . 4. The constant-velocity joint assembly (1) as claimed in any of the preceding claims, comprising a power and signal transmission device (17) having a fixed part (17a) and a rotatable part (17b) configured to interact with the fixed part (17a), wherein the coupling structure (5) has a central channel (2) and the rotatable part (17b) is fixedly attached to the coupling structure (5) in the central channel (2) and connected to the torque 

transducer (5f) , and wherein the fixed part (17a) is provided in the central channel (2) detached from the coupling structure (5), whereby the rotatable part (17b) is able to rotate relative to the fixed part (17a) . 5. The constant-velocity joint assembly (1) as claimed in claim 4, wherein the power and signal transmission device (17) is a slip ring. 6. The constant-velocity joint assembly (1) as claimed in any of the preceding claims, comprising a crown wheel (3) , wherein the coupling structure (5) and the crown wheel (3) form an integral component. 7. The constant-velocity joint assembly (1) as claimed in any of claims 1-5, comprising a crown wheel (3) , wherein the coupling structure (5) is configured to provide a drive connection between the crown wheel (3) and the output shaft (7) . 8. The constant-velocity joint assembly (1) as claimed in claim 7, wherein the crown wheel (3) and the coupling structure (5) form a second joint configured to enable angling of the crown wheel (3) relative to the coupling structure (5) , wherein the torque transducer (5f) is configured to detect a torque acting on the coupling structure (5) provided by the output shaft (7) and the crown wheel (3) . 9. The constant-velocity joint assembly (1) as claimed in claim 8, comprising a first set of bearing balls (4) configured to enable the angling of the crown wheel (3) relative to the coupling structure (5) at constant rotational speed and a second set of bearing balls (6) 

 i8 configured to enable angling of the output shaft (7) relative to the coupling structure (5) . 10. The constant-velocity joint assembly (1) as claimed in claim 9, wherein the coupling structure (5) has a first end (5b) provided with a first set of cup grooves (5d) receiving a respective one of the first set of bearing balls (4) and a second end (5c) provided with a second set of cup grooves (5e) receiving a respective one of the second set of bearing balls (6) . 11. The constant-velocity joint assembly (1) as claimed in claim 10, wherein the output shaft (7) has a central output shaft channel (7) provided with a third set of cup grooves (7c) receiving a respective one of the second set of bearing balls (6), and wherein the crown wheel (3) has a central crown wheel channel (3a) provided with a fourth set of cup grooves (3b) receiving a respective one of the first set of bearing balls (4) . 12. The constant-velocity joint assembly (1) as claimed in any of claims 8-11, wherein the coupling structure (5) has a first end (5b) and a second end (5c) opposite to the first end (5b) , wherein the crown wheel (3) is configured to receive the first end (5b) and the output shaft (7) is configured to receive the second end (5c) . 13. The constant-velocity joint assembly (1) as claimed in any of the preceding claims, wherein the first joint is an Rzeppa joint. 14. A power tool (9; 9') comprising a constant-velocity joint assembly (1) as claimed in any of claims 1-13. 15. The power tool (9') as claimed in claim 14, comprising a planetary gear system (23) and an auxiliary torque transducer (25) configured to mechanically interact with the planetary gear system (23) to provide an auxiliary torque measurement.
